source_pr.title: *: make union execution parallel and fix a union plan bug.
source_pr.body:
An enhancement and a bug fix
1. make union execution parallel
2. order can't push across union / unionall but limit can.
@shenli @coocood @zimulala @tiancaiamao @XuHuaiyu @winoros @lamxTyler PTAL

symptoms: testSQL = `select * from (select id from union_test union select id from union_test) t order by id;` (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: testSQL = `select * from (select id from union_test union select id from union_test) t order by id;` (executor/executor_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: testSQL = `select * from (select id from union_test union select id from union_test) t order by id;` (executor/executor_test.go)
files: executor/executor.go, executor/executor_test.go, executor/run.sh, plan/match_property.go, plan/physical_plan_builder.go, plan/physical_plan_test.go, session_test.go
